name: token-wand
description: Token Wand — Color Token System for Figma

scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && eslint src/ scripts/ && tsx scripts/build-presets.ts && vite build && node scripts/plugin.js dist
scripts.build:release: tsc --noEmit && eslint src/ scripts/ && tsx scripts/build-presets.ts --release && VITE_OUT_DIR=dist-release vite build && node scripts/plugin.js dist-release --release
scripts.watch: tsc --noEmit && eslint src/ scripts/ && node scripts/watch.js
scripts.watch:release: tsc --noEmit && eslint src/ scripts/ && node scripts/watch.js --release
scripts.theme:gen: echo 'Theme CSS is now source-controlled in src/ui/theme/theme2.0/ — edit directly or regenerate from the plugin'
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint
